name: Prep My Day
description: Calendar, weather, tasks overview + urgent emails → compiled morning briefing

steps.action: Check today's calendar via `gog cal today`, current weather, and outstanding tasks. Compile a structured overview with time blocks, priorities, and weather impact on plans.
Run `himalaya list -s unseen` and identify any urgent or time-sensitive emails from the last 12 hours. Write a summary of urgent items to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Urgent Email Summary'.
Read the urgent email summary from inbox. Combine with calendar/weather/tasks overview into a single 'Your Day' briefing. Send to Anthony via Telegram.
